programme.desc: If you liked the documentary Blackfish, this film picks up where Blackfish left off.

programme.title: Airtime Ep12: Kiteboarding The British Virgin Islands
programme.desc: Catch wind of a jet-set journey through the British Virgin Islands with British Virgin billionaire, Richard Branson and kiteboarding royalty Martin Vari and Ceridwen Jones. Highlights include a fourteen-mile kiteboarding regatta, magnificent scenery and epic freeriding.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep213: Fort Lauderdale, Florida
programme.desc: In the Season 2 finale, host Steven Bull checks out the Fort Lauderdale International Boat Show, the Manitoba Marine Museum and gives Silent Film a try.

programme.title: Coral Reefs: Trouble In Paradise
programme.desc: An international scientific team travels to the Chagos Archipelago, a tropical paradise in the Indian Ocean, to study one of the planet’s healthiest coral reefs. Initially, they’re thrilled with the reef’s beauty and abundance. But in the space of just a few weeks they witness a serious case of bleaching…evidence that even the earth’s most isolated places aren’t safe from the ravages of climate change

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Kayak Fishing vs Executive Chef
programme.desc: This is the best tasting episode this season! Mike and crew link up with Executive Chef, Doug Gahns who invites Mike into his kitchen for some lessons and instruction from the Chef. Mike then jumps into a head-to-head challenge to see who the judges pick as the CHEF-SQUATCH of the day!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep116: Aquabike World Championship Series – Sharjah, United Arab Emirates (Part 1)
programme.desc: Hot Water returns to Sharjah in the United Arab Emirates where the Aquabike World Championship will be decided over three motos on Khalid Lagoon in the Ski Division for both men and women.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep117: Aquabike World Championship Series – Sharjah, United Arab Emirates (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hot racing action continues in Sharjah of the United Arab Emirates where the Aquabike World Championship will be decided on Khalid Lagoon in both the Freestyle and Runabout Divisions.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep316: RC44 World Championship Sailing Tour
programme.desc: This episode highlights the 2nd stop on the RC44 World Championship Sailing Tour from the picture postcard island of Marstrand on Sweden’s west coast. These are high-performance owner-driver one-design boats, which makes for compelling and intense competition.

programme.title: Airtime Ep12: Kiteboarding The British Virgin Islands
programme.desc: Catch wind of a jet-set journey through the British Virgin Islands with British Virgin billionaire, Richard Branson and kiteboarding royalty Martin Vari and Ceridwen Jones. Highlights include a fourteen-mile kiteboarding regatta, magnificent scenery and epic freeriding.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep213: Fort Lauderdale, Florida
programme.desc: In the Season 2 finale, host Steven Bull checks out the Fort Lauderdale International Boat Show, the Manitoba Marine Museum and gives Silent Film a try.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Teenrager
programme.desc: Skater CJ Collins is now part of the Toy Machine Blood Sucking Skateboard Company. To celebrate his son’s 13th birthday, father Chad Collins made a 13-minute edit of CJ footage he’s been compiling over the years. As the title says, CJ’s not a teenager, he’s a teenrager!

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Para Dressage Dreams Campaigning for Change
programme.desc: On the final episode of the season we aim for a second gold medal with reigning Paralympic Champion Sanne Voets, raise awareness of inclusivity in the equestrian world with Ride Out Racism founder Reece McCook, and break down the art of eventing with British Equestrian’s Georgie Spence.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 1: Minding, Mentoring Mountain Magic
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates the devotion of grooms working behind the scenes at the Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup Final in Barcelona. We visit the UK’s Windrush Equestrian Foundation where legendary Eventer Pippa Funnell mentors young riders in the ways of the horse. And scale new heights in the Canadian Rockies at Mica Mountain Ranch, a place helping humans unbridle their lives and find inner peace through ponies.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 4 - Arville
programme.desc: The FEI Eventing Nations Cup is back with leg 4 in Belgium! Teams reunite in Arville to compete in eventing and become the best nation in the equestrian sport. Last time, France moved to the top in Le Pin au Haras, and competition is proving to be complicated. Are you ready for the challenge?Watch the best moments of the fourth leg in Arville.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.desc: Take an aerial journey through Norway's breathtaking winter landscapes, flying over snow-covered fjords, the Atlantic Ocean Road, and picturesque villages like Bud. Immerse yourself in the natural sounds and quiet beauty of this remarkable country.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. A serious competitor bears the Maserati brand. With the Levante, die Italian carmaker wants to stir up the competitive market for sporty SUVs.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: After its introduction the Audi RS6 was the benchmark when it came to extreme estate cars. Its performance was already very impressive, but according to the Audi tuners that still wasn't enough.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Discovering Murray River

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Chain of Souls
programme.desc: When a naive aspiring actress from Podunk, Texas disappears in Los Angeles, her protective sister comes looking for her. The clues lead her to a diabolical cult masquerading as a theater group and the fight of her life.

programme.title: Infliction
programme.desc: In 2011, two brothers documented their murder spree in North Carolina. This is the actual assembled footage.

programme.title: Blood Punch
programme.desc: A young man breaks out of rehab to follow a mysterious girl into an easy drug score. But when she lures him to an isolated cabin, their simple love triangle quickly descends into a mind-blowing cycle of carnage and mayhem with no escape.

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Here's a look at the first year for a new Royal Family after Prince William and Kate welcome a baby boy.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E13 - William And Kate One Year On
programme.desc: William and Catherine got married in a fairytale ceremony on April 29, 2011, with more than two billion people tuning in and celebrations happening all around the world.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: In this celebration of childhood, a 10-year-old girl struggles to find her place in a 'boys' world.

programme.title: Rocket Perelman
programme.desc: In a quest for self-directed living, ten artists near Berlin join forces to start the artist's colony 'Rakete Perelman'. But, they need money.

programme.title: Brother
programme.desc: Lukasz (24) works for a big name in the industry. But after the death of his mother, his little brother Kamil (13) suddenly appears on his doorstep.

programme.title: Who Am I Happy
programme.desc: When Mika enters 15-year-old Alicia life, she is confused by their appearance.

programme.title: Beat Beat Heart
programme.desc: A playful romanticist has been waiting for the love of her life to return – when suddenly her newly separated mother moves in.

programme.title: Heiko's World
programme.desc: From YouTube to the cinemas: In this loving homage to Berlin's pub culture, Berlin original Heiko must win a darts tournament.

programme.title: Gender Crisis
programme.desc: Samson and Delilah: The Old Testament story of a man with irrepressible strength - as a silent film, told in a modern way.

programme.title: Motorcity
programme.desc: A compelling exploration of the complexities of American life, history, and society through the lens of the unique and fascinating sport drag racing.

programme.title: Stories from the Sea
programme.desc: This documentary portrays women who embark on a sea voyage thus challenging traditional gender roles just by being there.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E15 - Episode 15
programme.desc: Willem attempts to win back Petra’s trust, as two old lovers reunite. Angelique tries to make things right with Elizabeth, but an old proposal sticks in her throat.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E07 - Episode 07
programme.desc: Felicity’s liaison with Stefan grows ever more dangerous as the truth catches up. SJ rebels against the family and finds friendship in a hopeless place.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: An unexpected affair ensues between two Legacy employees. Msizi makes moves to ensure his position as CEO becomes permanent.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E09 - Episode 09
programme.desc: Stefan and Felicity are bombarded with more pictures showing their faces. SJ tries to discover more about his brother. Felicity finally gets her wish to be acting CEO, but was it worth it?

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E10 - Episode 10
programme.desc: Felicity and Stefan’s search for their blackmailer proves more dangerous than they thought, while Petra’s lunch with SJ takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E11 - Episode 11
programme.desc: Two lovers have their backs against the wall when a blackmailer asks for something they loathe to give. Petra does her best to lie about her feelings.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E12 - Episode 12
programme.desc: Petra realises that it’s not all black and white when it comes to the game of love. John has Felicity incensed when John derails her plan. Stefan comes across startling information about an enemy.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: A Marine rookie and his mentor vie for a nurse’s love, battling together in the air and on Nicaraguan battlefields.

programme.title: Long John Silver's Return to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Long John Silver rescues his friend Jim from rival pirates and risks all for hidden treasure in this colorful swashbuckling sequel.

programme.desc: A wrongfully accused ex-con hunts down the criminals behind a daring heist to clear his name and uncover the mastermind’s scheme.

programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms

programme.title: Captian Kidd

programme.title: DOA

programme.title: Gung Ho
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island

programme.title: New Number Same Name
programme.desc: If you’re looking at what’s next and feeling nervous, remember this: What God has done in your life is only the foundation, not the finish line. He’s a creative God, still at work in ways you’re not expecting. Let go of your plan so God can show you His purpose.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 7
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck — that’s how Moses felt, too. But that wasn’t the end of his story, and it’s not yours, either. It’s just the middle. There’s hope past this chapter, and it’s found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment
programme.desc: If you’ve been feeling pulled in every direction, it might be time to pivot. God isn’t asking you to do everything — He’s asking you to stay close to Him

programme.title: The Lord Will Lighten Your Load
programme.desc: When you’ve been hurt, it can be hard to keep hoping. But God wants to lift the weight you’ve been carrying today. Learn from the life of Israel (Jacob, Jacob), how God will give you a strategy to unburden your heart and move forward.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila and Rosa receive a message from El Doliente, they meet the mysterious character who asks them to listen to her about the reason for her intriguing role, to take revenge on Ezequiel and Fausto, who had swindled their father.
It is Camila's last chance to tell Torrealba the name of the person who killed Ezequiel. Camila had wanted to protect him. She reiterates that Ezequiel, drunk, tried to abuse her.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In the presence of an indignant Florencia, Victoria -convinced that her love for Nicolás only attracts death- says goodbye to her beloved. Seeing that Victoria is looking for a clue that Genara was murdered, Sergio offers Victoria all his help to discover the truth. When night falls, Sergio believes that Genara -before her death- told Federico everything he had heard from Sergio about her intentions to kill Nicolás for love, so Sergio threatens Federico to take him to jail for Genara's death if he gives him away. Meanwhile, Clementina tries to cheer up Victoria, who has returned to the capital because she now trusts that Sergio will help her get justice. That night, Sergio says goodbye -tiernally- to Victoria when the couple is surprised by Clementina; alone with Victoria; Clementina is interested to know if Victoria is thinking of resuming her relationship with Sergio after the mistake she might have made by marrying him; Victoria only wants to save herself from an impossible love: Nicolás Del Casal.

Adelaida is upset with Isaura for having convinced Hilario of her love breakup with Carlos Hansen after the men fought. Seeing her father and Nicolás arrive at the scene in a daze, Victoria wonders who could have summoned her; Nicolás does not understand why Victoria would expose herself to so much danger, but the girl believed that Nicolás was calling her to help her solve the mystery about Genara's death. Florencia regrets having lost her son, but she will not allow Nicolás to get close to Victoria.While Sergio consoles Victoria, Hilario says that Genara's body was exhumed for tests, which proved that the girl was murdered. Victoria is determined to avenge her friend's death.

Guillermo tells Lorena that he will take care of raising Ignacio from now on. Lorena, unable to cope with the pressure she is under, yells at Guillermo that she cannot kill anyone and asks him to free her from this responsibility that does not belong to her. Patricia confesses to Alberto that she loves him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena confesses to Marco Aurelio that her brother and his wife are the masterminds of the attacks against her. Elvis makes a last attempt to get Virginia to take the abortion pills. Malena discovers several photos of herself in Isabel's house. Malena goes to Patricia to get a divorce from Pablo - Marco Aurelio feels the urge to tell Alberto what he knows, but Lorena convinces him to keep quiet until he can verify what he has just confided in her.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara Inés asks Anastasio if he believes that the Pastora who married Israel in the past is the same woman she married in the present, he is surprised.

programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max está demasiado dolido y no cree ya en ese amor, advirtiéndole que a partir de ahora se dedicará a odiarla, a olvidarla y que será ella la victima de su propia decisión. Ciego de ira y de dolor, grita a los presentes que se retiren pues no habrá boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La vida de Camila ha dado un giro inusitado: es una persona envenenada por el odio y los deseos de venganza. Max no logra superar su resentimiento por el desprecio y la humillación que le hizo Camila. La verdadera razón por la cual no pudieron casarse, está escrita en el cuaderno que Rosa envió.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila le exige a Marcelina que le confiese lo que decían las cartas que mandó a quemar. Ante tanta presión ésta cuenta lo que para inculpar a Rosa Blanco. Max

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel plantea de forma desinteresada ayudar a Camila a encontrar a su mamá, pero ella expresa que será un trato en que ambos ganarán. Fausto sorprende a Julia con Gregorio en el apartamento de Amelia. Max, desahoga su dolor con Astrid, a quien Camila pidió que lo ayudara a olvidarla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Baile Peligroso
programme.desc: Miluska es una cantante, que se gana la vida haciendo shows musicales para un hotel turístico en el sur de Perú. Durante las presentaciones conoce una variedad de empresarios de todo nivel, entre ellos está Don Mauro, un señor respetable, que admira mucho a Miluska, Carlos Reyes, un traficante de mujeres que se hace pasar por empresario. Al ser cliente frecuente del hotel se gana cierta confianza con las chicas, un día le ofrece a Miluska hacer un show para su hotel en otra provincia, pero no sabían que caerían en una trampa difícil de escapar.

programme.title: Codón Es Una Máquina
programme.desc: Dos amigos se reúnen para planear la creación de una película con un equipo de producción filmando el proceso, dos cuarentones con problemitas están muy decididos a hacer la famosa película de la que llevan años hablando. Se vienen tan arriba que hasta ya graban el making of... y hasta están haciendo un casting, aunque no tienen ni guión ni puñetera idea de lo que van a rodar. Y lo peor: no sospechan que están en las manos de un loco peligroso.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
